author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Angular analysis of the $B^{0} \to K^{*0} \mu^{+} \mu^{-}$ decay using 3 fb$^{-1}$ of integrated luminosity
abstract: an angular analysis of the $B^0\to K^{\ast0}(\to K^+\pi^-)\mu^+\mu^-$ decay in determining CP-averaged observables and CP asymmetries, with an integrated luminosity of 3.0 fb$^{−1}$ of $pp$ collision data
